summary: The posts detail a range of small UAS operations and developments on the battlefield. Ukrainian forces are deploying E-300 drones, converted from light aircraft, in the Zaporizhzhia direction, while FPV drone crews within the "Zapad" forces group are targeting Ukrainian Armed Forces reconnaissance drones on the Kharkiv axis. The Russian "Elka" anti-drone system is effectively intercepting Ukrainian fixed-wing attack drones like the "Hornet," and the "Rubikon" Center reports 136 targets eliminated on March 14, 2026, across multiple directions including Donbas and Sumy. Ukrainian kamikaze drones struck the Afipsky oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, causing a major fire. Footage shows Ukrainian FPV pilots using tactics such as throwing Russians off horses before striking, and even a Russian soldier charging at a drone with a bayonet and being destroyed. Additionally, Ukrainian forces are countering Russian Mavic-style drones by deploying their own FPV drones in coordinated strikes, and long-range fiber-optic drones are continuing to destroy Russian artillery systems in a series of targeted attacks.
